name: Running chicken
description: This is a parkour leisure game. In the game, chicks are running on a ball. There are many gold coins waiting for players to collect on the road. The game is cartoonish and fun to play. Interested partners, please try it
instructions: Slide the screen left and right to control the direction
tags: 3D Games, Boy, Boys, Casual, Collecting, Collection, Funny, Game, Games, Girl, H5, HTML, HTML5, Hypercasual, Kid, Kids, Mobile, Sport, Sports
